contacts.subject: Friendly Payment Reminder
contacts.email_body:
Dear Raj Traders,

This is a friendly reminder regarding some outstanding invoices on your account.

Our records indicate a total outstanding balance of ₹57,000, comprised of the following:

*   INV001: ₹45,000 (due 2025-03-01, currently 47 days overdue)
*   INV002: ₹12,000 (due 2025-03-15, currently 33 days overdue)

We understand that things can sometimes be overlooked, and we would appreciate it if you could review these invoices and arrange for payment at your earliest convenience.

Please let us know if you have already processed these payments or if there's anything we can do to assist you.

Thank you for your business and continued partnership.

Sincerely,

VoiceOS Collections Team

contacts.subject: Urgent: Payment Required
contacts.email_body:
Dear Raj Traders,

This email serves as a formal reminder regarding outstanding payments on your account. Our records indicate a total outstanding balance of ₹57,000.

The following invoices are currently overdue:

*   INV001: ₹45,000 (Due: 2025-03-01, 47 days overdue)
*   INV002: ₹12,000 (Due: 2025-03-15, 33 days overdue)

We kindly request that you remit the full outstanding amount of ₹57,000 within seven (7) days of the date of this email. Please ensure payment is made via [mention preferred payment method(s) - e.g., bank transfer, online payment portal].

Failure to receive payment by [Date - 7 days from email date] may unfortunately necessitate further action to recover the debt. We value your business and would prefer to resolve this matter amicably.

Please contact us immediately if you have already made a payment or if you require clarification regarding these invoices.

Sincerely,

VoiceOS Collections Team

contacts.subject: Final Notice Before Legal Action
contacts.email_body:
Dear Raj Traders,

Re: Overdue Payment Notification for INV001 and INV002

We are writing to bring to your attention that your account with us is significantly overdue. As per our records, the total outstanding amount is ₹57,000, which is comprised of two unpaid invoices: INV001 for ₹45,000 (due on 2025-03-01, now 47 days overdue) and INV002 for ₹12,000 (due on 2025-03-15, now 33 days overdue).

We urge you to settle this outstanding amount immediately to avoid any further action. We expect payment of the full amount within the next 3 days. If we do not receive payment or a satisfactory response from you within this timeframe, we may be forced to consider legal action to recover the debt.

We hope that you will take this matter seriously and take immediate action to resolve this outstanding amount. If you are experiencing any difficulties in making the payment, please do not hesitate to contact us to discuss possible alternatives.

Sincerely,
VoiceOS Collections Team
